title: Illini Dominate First-Round NCAA Matchup: Mirkovic's Record-Breaking Performance Sets Tone for Penn Rout
body: In a resounding display of collegiate basketball prowess, the University of Illinois men's team cruised to a dominant 105-70 victory over No. 14 seed Penn in the first round of the NCAA Tournament on Thursday. A record-setting performance by center Kofi Cockburn's teammate, Simeon Wilches' teammate,  and fellow forward, Dajuan Harris' teammate,  Peter Nance's teammate,  and Simeon's teammate,  Peter's
